recommendations.title: The Iceman
recommendations.overview: The true story of Richard Kuklinski, the notorious contract killer and family man.

recommendations.title: Criminal
recommendations.overview: CIA Agent Bill Pope is on a mission to track down a shadowy hacker named 'The Dutchman'. When he gets mysteriously killed, an experimental procedure transfers his memories into a dangerous ex-convict. When he wakes up Pope's memories, his mission is

recommendations.title: Kings
recommendations.overview: A foster family in South Central a few weeks before the city erupts in violence following the verdict of the Rodney King trial in 1992.

recommendations.title: Melancholia
recommendations.overview: Two sisters find their already strained relationship challenged as a mysterious new planet threatens to collide with Earth.

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Headhunters
recommendations.overview: An accomplished headhunter risks everything to obtain a valuable painting owned by a former mercenary.

recommendations.title: Speed
recommendations.overview: Tensions run high when a crazed bomber rigs a Los Angeles bus with a device that will kill everyone on board if the vehicle's speed dips below fifty miles per hour.

recommendations.title: Extortion
recommendations.overview: A doctor desperately tries to save his wife and their 5 year old son after their vacation in the Bahamas takes an unexpected turn.
